system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_tinhluyke_reverse_fast_full","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.sp_TinhLuyKe_Reverse_Fast_FULL
(
    @Nam   INT = NULL,
    @Thang INT = NULL,
    @Loai  NVARCHAR(50) = N'LuyKeThang'
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET XACT_ABORT ON;

    DECLARE @Today DATE = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 0) CHUẨN HÓA NĂM / THÁNG
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    SET @Nam   = ISNULL(@Nam,   YEAR(@Today));
    SET @Thang = ISNULL(@Thang, MONTH(@Today));

    IF @Thang < 1 OR @Thang > 12
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR (N'Tháng không hợp lệ (1–12)', 16, 1);
        RETURN;
    END;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) XÁC ĐỊNH KIỂU KỲ
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE @PeriodType TINYINT;
    -- 1 = Năm | 2 = Tháng | 3 = Tuần | 4 = Ngày

    SET @PeriodType =
        CASE @Loai
            WHEN N'LuyKeNam'   THEN 1
            WHEN N'LuyKeThang' THEN 2
            WHEN N'LuyKeTuan'  THEN 3
            WHEN N'LuyKeNgay'  THEN 4
            ELSE 2
        END;

    DECLARE @TargetStart DATE =
        CASE @PeriodType
            WHEN 1 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam,1,1)
            WHEN 2 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam,@Thang,1)
            WHEN 3 THEN DATEADD(WEEK,
                                DATEDIFF(WEEK,0,DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam,@Thang,1)),
                                0)
            WHEN 4 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam,@Thang,1)
        END;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) ANCHOR: TỒN KHO HIỆN TẠI
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Anchor') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Anchor;

    SELECT
        mavt COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT AS mavt,
        SUM(CAST(soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS slton_anchor
    INTO #Anchor
    FROM tr_tonkho_sum
    GROUP BY mavt COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT;

    CREATE UNIQUE CLUSTERED INDEX CX_Anchor ON #Anchor(mavt);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) ĐƠN GIÁ TỒN = TB GIA QUYỀN NHẬP > 0
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AvgGiaNhap') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AvgGiaNhap;

    SELECT
        n.mavt COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT AS mavt,
        SUM(CAST(n.slnhap AS DECIMAL(38,6))
            * CAST(n.gianhap AS DECIMAL(38,6))
            * CAST(n.tigia   AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
        / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(n.slnhap AS DECIMAL(38,6))),0) AS dgton
    INTO #AvgGiaNhap
    FROM tr_ctphieunhap n
    JOIN tr_phieunhap pn ON pn.sopn = n.sopn AND pn.active = 1
    WHERE ISNULL(n.gianhap,0) > 0
    GROUP BY n.mavt COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT;

    CREATE UNIQUE CLUSTERED INDEX CX_AvgGiaNhap ON #AvgGiaNhap(mavt);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) NHẬP / XUẤT THEO KỲ (SAU TARGET → HIỆN TẠI)
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#NX') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #NX;

    SELECT
        mavt,
        PeriodStart,
        SUM(slnhap) AS slnhap,
        SUM(slxuat) AS slxuat
    INTO #NX
    FROM (
        -- NHẬP
        SELECT
            n.mavt COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT AS mavt,
            CASE @PeriodType
                WHEN 1 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(n.ngaynhap),1,1)
                WHEN 2 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(n.ngaynhap),MONTH(n.ngaynhap),1)
                WHEN 3 THEN DATEADD(WEEK,DATEDIFF(WEEK,0,n.ngaynhap),0)
                WHEN 4 THEN CAST(n.ngaynhap AS DATE)
            END AS PeriodStart,
            CAST(n.slnhap AS DECIMAL(38,6)) AS slnhap,
            CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38,6)) AS slxuat
        FROM tr_ctphieunhap n
        JOIN tr_phieunhap pn ON pn.sopn = n.sopn AND pn.active = 1
        WHERE n.ngaynhap >= @TargetStart

        UNION ALL

        -- XUẤT
        SELECT
            x.mact COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT,
            CASE @PeriodType
                WHEN 1 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(x.ngaytao),1,1)
                WHEN 2 THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(x.ngaytao),MONTH(x.ngaytao),1)
                WHEN 3 THEN DATEADD(WEEK,DATEDIFF(WEEK,0,x.ngaytao),0)
                WHEN 4 THEN CAST(x.ngaytao AS DATE)
            END,
            CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38,6)),
            CAST(x.soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6))
        FROM tr_ctphieuxuat x
        JOIN tr_phieuxuat px ON px.sopx = x.phieuxuat AND px.active = 1
        WHERE x.ngaytao >= @TargetStart
    ) S
    GROUP BY mavt, PeriodStart;

    CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX CX_NX ON #NX(mavt, PeriodStart DESC);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) TÍNH TỒN (ANCHOR → LÙI DẦN, KHÔNG RECURSIVE)
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#KQ') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #KQ;

    ;WITH D AS (
        SELECT
            n.*,
            a.slton_anchor,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.mavt ORDER BY n.PeriodStart DESC) AS rn
        FROM #NX n
        JOIN #Anchor a ON a.mavt = n.mavt
    ),
    F AS (
        SELECT
            *,
            CASE
                WHEN rn = 1 THEN slton_anchor
                ELSE LAG(sltondau) OVER (PARTITION BY mavt ORDER BY PeriodStart DESC)
            END AS sltoncuoi
        FROM (
            SELECT
                *,
                CASE
                    WHEN slton_anchor - slnhap + slxuat < 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE slton_anchor - slnhap + slxuat
                END AS sltondau
            FROM D
        ) X
    )
    SELECT
        NEWID() AS Id,
        @Loai AS loai,
        mavt,
        PeriodStart AS ngay,
        CASE
            WHEN sltoncuoi - slnhap + slxuat < 0 THEN 0
            ELSE sltoncuoi - slnhap + slxuat
        END AS sltondau,
        slnhap,
        slxuat,
        sltoncuoi,
        0 AS dgnhap,
        0 AS dgxuat,
       
-- ... (truncated)","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.d","dbo.f","dbo.tk","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material_luyke","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.m","dbo.tr_material_luyke"],"flags":["has-cte","has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
